title: New Jersey Claims Adjudicator Rates — CBA Context Confirmed, Salaries Estimated
description: New Jersey DDS examiner/supervisor classifications (Claims Adjudicator; Senior Claims Adjudicator CSC Job Spec #64947; Claims Adjudicator Supervisor) with confirmed CWA/IFPTE 2023-2027 CBA context (3.5% annual, new Step 11) but ESTIMATED salary ranges from Glassdoor/ZipRecruiter — the official CWA Local 1036 / IFPTE 195 salary-schedule PDFs were not web-fetchable. Estimates: Claims Adjudicator $53,560–$68,777; Senior Claims Adjudicator $67,000–$93,909; Supervisor null (aligned with Senior, unextracted).

columns.name: classes.<class>.job_spec_code
columns.description: NJ CSC job-spec code (e.g. 64947 / 64947C for Senior Claims Adjudicator).

columns.name: classes.<class>.min
columns.description: Estimated annual minimum (Glassdoor/ZipRecruiter; null where not extracted).

columns.name: classes.<class>.max
columns.description: Estimated annual maximum (null where not extracted).

source.publisher: CWA Local 1036 (likely; IFPTE Local 195 possible) / NJ Civil Service Commission; NJ DOL Division of Disability Determination Services
source.title: CWA NJ State Salary Schedules 2023-2027 (estimates only; official PDF not extracted)

notes: Computed (≈ estimate): examiner/supervisor titles and the CWA/IFPTE 2023-2027 CBA terms (3.5% annual, Step 11 added, Range 9 Step 2 hire floor) are confirmed, but min/max are Glassdoor/ZipRecruiter aggregates — the official CWA Local 1036 / IFPTE 195 salary-schedule PDFs were inaccessible via web-fetch and exact Range/Step assignment is unverified. Union jurisdiction (CWA 1036 vs IFPTE 195) for DDS Claims Adjudicators is unconfirmed. Supervisor min/max are null.
